code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut a = 0
mut b_end = 0
mut s = 0
mut idx = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut has_sign = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(ch)
    if ch == 32 or ch == 9 or ch == 10 or ch == 13
      if in_num
        let v = cur * sign
        if idx == 0
          a = v
        else if idx == 1
          b_end = v
        else if idx == 2
          s = v
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = false
        has_sign = false
      end
    else if ch == 45 and not in_num and not has_sign
      sign = -1
      has_sign = true
    else if ch == 43 and not in_num and not has_sign
      has_sign = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (ch - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let v = cur * sign
  if idx == 0
    a = v
  else if idx == 1
    b_end = v
  else if idx == 2
    s = v
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut v = a
mut first = true
while v < b_end
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  v = v + s
end
println(out)
